hero.title: School Transport Services
hero.subtitle: Safe, reliable, and convenient transportation for all students

benefits.title: Why Choose Our Transport Service?
benefits.description: We prioritize safety, convenience, and reliability in our transportation services

items.title: Safety First
items.description: GPS tracked buses with trained drivers and attendants

items.title: Punctuality
items.description: Reliable and timely pick-up and drop services

items.title: Convenience
items.description: Doorstep service with extensive route coverage

tabs.title: Transport Information
tabs.description: Explore our transportation services and facilities

busRoutes.title: Bus Routes & Schedules
busRoutes.description: Comprehensive information about our transportation routes and timings

safetyFeatures.title: Safety Measures
safetyFeatures.description: Our comprehensive safety protocols ensure your child's security during transit

features.title: GPS Tracking
features.description: Real-time tracking of all buses with live location sharing with parents

features.title: Trained Staff
features.description: Drivers with minimum 5 years experience and attendants trained in first aid

features.title: Speed Governors
features.description: All buses equipped with speed limiters not exceeding 40 km/h

features.title: Emergency Alerts
features.description: Panic buttons and emergency alert systems in all vehicles

features.title: Regular Maintenance
features.description: Weekly maintenance checks and comprehensive quarterly servicing

features.title: Safety Drills
features.description: Monthly safety drills and evacuation practice for students

guidelines.title: Safety Guidelines for Students
items: Remain seated while the bus is in motion
Keep hands and head inside the bus at all times
Follow instructions from the driver and attendant
Report any concerns to the transport incharge

feeStructure.title: Transport Fees
feeStructure.description: Affordable and flexible payment options for our transportation services

plans.description: One-time payment for the entire academic year
Pay at the beginning of each term
Special discounts for families with multiple children

paymentMethods.title: Payment Methods
items: Cash payment at school accounts office

items.title: Pickup Policy
items.description: Students must be ready 5 minutes before scheduled pickup time. Bus will wait maximum 2 minutes.

items.title: Absence Notification
items.description: Parents must inform transport incharge if student will not use bus on any day.

items.title: Route Changes
items.description: Route change requests require 48 hours notice and are subject to availability.

items.title: Code of Conduct
items.description: Students must follow bus rules and maintain discipline during transit.

contact.title: Transport Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with our transport department for any queries or assistance

emergency.title: Emergency Contact
emergency.description: For urgent transport-related issues during bus operation hours:
emergency.availability: Available during all bus operational hours (6:30 AM - 5:30 PM)

resources.title: Transport Resources
resources.description: Downloadable forms and information about our transport services

items.title: Transport Application Form
items.description: Application form for new transport service requests

items.title: Bus Routes Map
items.description: Detailed map of all bus routes and pickup points

items.title: Parent Transport Guide
items.description: Complete guide for parents about transport services

items.title: Fee Payment Schedule
items.description: Transport fee payment dates and methods

cta.title: Need Transport Services?
cta.description: Apply for school transport or get answers to your transportation questions
